name: xvlog-linter
description: Verilog and SystemVerilog linting using Xilinx xvlog (Vivado)

verible.path.description: Path to the directory containing verible-verilog-format. Leave empty if verible is already on your PATH.

verible.formatting.arguments.description: Additional command-line arguments passed to verible-verilog-format (e.g. --column_limit=100).

xvlog.path.description: Path to the directory containing the xvlog binary. Leave empty if xvlog is already on your PATH.

xvlog.linting.enabled.description: Enable or disable the xvlog linter.

xvlog.linting.arguments.description: Additional command-line arguments passed to xvlog.

xvlog.linting.includePath.description: Include paths for xvlog. Relative paths resolve from the workspace root.

xvlog.linting.runAtFileLocation.description: Run xvlog in the directory of the file being linted instead of the workspace root.

xvlog.linting.addFileLocationToIncludePa.description: Automatically add the directory of the file being linted to the xvlog include path.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
